zh.lifeSummary: 當John Thurston於1525年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特維德莫時，他的父親Henry Thurston19歲，母親Johan15歲。他於大約1550年與Margareta Warman在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1585年3月26日享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特維德莫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Thurston于1525年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特維德莫时，他的父亲Henry Thurston19岁，母亲Johan15岁。他于大约1550年与Margareta Warman在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1585年3月26日享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特維德莫。

nameMeanings.name: Thurston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Anglo-Norman, Anglo-Scandinavian, and Middle English personal name Thurstan, Thorsten (Old Norse Thórsteinn, Thorsten, Anglicized as Old English Thurstān; see Thorstensen ).
habitational name from Thurston in Suffolk, so called from the genitive case of the Old Norse personal name Thóri (see Thor ) + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Tustin
meanings: English (Worcestershire, Warwickshire and Gloucestershire): variant of   Thurston  .

variants.name: Thorstensen
meanings: Norwegian and Danish: patronymic from the personal name Thorsten, a variant of Thorstein, Old Norse Thórsteinn, composed of the name of the god Thórr (see Thor ) + steinn ‘stone, rock’, hence meaning ‘altar of Thor’ or perhaps ‘hammer of Thor’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Thurston was born in 1525, in Wedmore, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry Thurston, was 19 and his mother, Johan, was 15. He married Margareta Warman about 1550, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 26 March 1585, at the age of 60, and was buried in Wedmore, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Thurston est né en 1525, à Wedmore, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Thurston, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Johan, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Margareta Warman environ 1550, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 26 mars 1585, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Wedmore, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Thurston 1525 in Wedmore, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Thurston 19 und seine Mutter Johan 15. Er hat um 1550 in England, United Kingdom Margareta Warman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 26. März 1585 im Alter von 60 Jahren und wurde in Wedmore, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Thurston è nato il nel 1525 nel Wedmore, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry Thurston, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Johan, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Margareta Warman circa 1550, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 26 marzo 1585, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Wedmore, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Thurstonが1525年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトウエドモーで生まれた時，父Henry Thurstonは19歳，母Johanは15歳であった。約1550年にイギリスイギリスでMargareta Warmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1585年3月26日に60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトウエドモーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Thurston(이)가 1525년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 w드모어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Thurston(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Johan(은)는 15세였다. 그는 대략 1550년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Margareta Warman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1585년 3월 26일 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 w드모어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Thurston nasceu em 1525, em Wedmore, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Thurston, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Johan, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Margareta Warman aproximadamente 1550, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de março de 1585, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Wedmore, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Thurston родился в 1525 г. в местности ведмор, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry Thurston было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Johan, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Margareta Warman около 1550 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 26 марта 1585 г. в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности ведмор, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Thurston nació en 1525, en Wedmore, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry Thurston, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Johan, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Margareta Warman aproximadamente 1550, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 26 de marzo de 1585, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Wedmore, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
